description: Designed for the man of style, this pair of black formal slip on shoes from lee cooper is set to pivot you into a world of royal living. Gear up to don that unparalleled look in this simple pair.Upper Leather upper for durability and style Side panels held together with an elastic band to provide a comfort Fit Upper panel runs in as shoe tongue with soft, meshed, fabric lining for added comfort, style, breathability and durability Lightly cushioned fabric sockliner for in step comfort, snug fit and easy wearing and removal of shoe Reinforced heel cup for added protection to the backfoot and to lock the heel in place Branding embossed on lateral side of upper panel Stitch detailing for durability and style Midsole Synthetic leather midsole for enhanced durability Padded foam footbed for all-day comfort Stitched brand badge on heel part of footbed Textured lining binding the upper and outsole, with added protection to the backfoot Outsole TPU outsole for extra comfort and durability Ridged on the edges and textured along central forefoot and back heel for durability, traction and grip Ergonomic arch fit on mid foot with branding CareWipe surface with a soft, clean cloth to remove dustPolish using a good quality leather conditioner
